name: sabai-gmail
description: Gmail MCP server with MCP App email editor for Claude

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && cross-env INPUT=mcp-app.html vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.server.json
scripts.build:bundle: npm run build && npx esbuild dist/server.js --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --outfile=dist/server.cjs --format=cjs --minify --external:fsevents
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run serve
scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development concurrently 'npm run watch' 'npm run serve'
